notes: Rebaselined after lowering LAP_DEPLOY_TARGET_MJ from 7.0 → 5.0 MJ (taper limit 8.75 → 6.25 MJ). The scheduler now starts tapering deploy power earlier in the lap so the battery lasts noticeably longer through sustained-throttle sections. Mode multipliers unchanged — peak boost (Attack/Overtake bypass the taper) is preserved. Calibration drift: 0-100 km/h 2.63 → 2.88 s (Balanced taper bites part-way up to 100 km/h; still inside real 2026 F1 2.6-2.8 s envelope when Attack/Overtake is used); DRS 200-300 7.48 → 7.58 s (taper begins ~50% of the way through the 100 km/h delta); stop distances and lat-g scenarios unchanged. Earlier history (1869498): SemiAuto mid-range deploy multipliers raised; coast cap 100 → 160 kW; critical floor 10% → 7%. Earlier Wave-4 history: brakes::heat_to_tires now divides by 130 °C span; Stefan-Boltzmann radiation uses 2× disc area; tire/engine cooling floor at ambient; brake-to-tire heat biased 70/30 inner/outer.
